A '''Starshine Surprise''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|intoxicating]] beverage, potent enough that it was recommended only for non-[[Human/Legends|Humans]] and the most hardened of Human drinkers. It allegedly got its name because, after consuming it, drinkers would discover themselves lying flat on their backs, looking at the stars. It was infused with fruit and often lit on fire before being consumed.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Starshine Surprise}}</ref> For those with even stronger constitutions, more than one Starshine Surprise could be put in the same glass; two resulted in a [[Tatooine Sunburn]], several in a [[Cassandra Sunrise/Legends|Cassandra Sunrise]].<ref name="GG9" />
